task_completion.description: Verify a Time & Sales window is open for the SPY instrument.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader Time & Sales window is visible with 'SPY' indicated in its title bar, instrument selector dropdown, or data area.

task_completion.description: Verify a Time & Sales window is open for the AAPL instrument.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader Time & Sales window is visible with 'AAPL' indicated in its title bar, instrument selector dropdown, or data area.

task_completion.description: Verify the SPY Time & Sales window is configured to display exactly 100 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Properties or Settings dialog for the SPY Time & Sales window is visible, with the 'Maximum items to display' (or equivalent row count setting) explicitly set to 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the AAPL Time & Sales window is configured to display exactly 100 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Properties or Settings dialog for the AAPL Time & Sales window is visible, with the 'Maximum items to display' (or equivalent row count setting) explicitly set to 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace was saved to persist the configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Interaction with the NinjaTrader Control Center's 'Workspaces' menu showing the user clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or a visual indicator that the active workspace has been saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the windows.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the NinjaTrader 8 graphical interface (menus, dialogs, right-clicks), rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The windows should display the standard NinjaTrader 8 styling, including the Control Center and specific Time & Sales window layouts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing workspace files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) or terminal windows should be visible editing the workspace XML files in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target instruments are SPY and AAPL. In NinjaTrader 8, the setting to change the number of rows in a Time & Sales window is specifically called 'Maximum items to display'. The target value for this setting is 100. The workspace must be saved via the NinjaTrader Control Center to persist these changes to the standard workspace directory.
